title: CV2 Backup Battery
description:
CV2 Backup Battery

Backup Battery

To replace the battery, follow the steps below.

(1) Remove a screw of the battery replacement cover on the bottom and remove the cover.

(2) Insert a small flat-head screwdriver to the groove on the battery holder and lift up the battery slowly.

The battery may jump by the spring of the battery holder.

(3) Set the new battery while the + side facing the front.

(4) Fix the cover.
